case_title: ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CASTELLINO ELECTRIC et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-24-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-12-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-12-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-16-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CASTELLINO ELECTRIC MITIDIERI, EMILIO DOMINIONI PUNTO E PASTA DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
